name: Sapa De Ajo Csah-Pah
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water to a boil.
2. Trim the crusts from the bread.
3. Cut the bread into 1/2 inch cubes.
4. Heat the olive oil in a wide, heavy-bottomed pot over low heat.
5. Add the garlic and stir constantly until it turns golden brown, about 15 seconds.
6. Add the bread cubes to the pot and fry for 3 to 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until they are lightly browned.
7. Pour in the boiling water, cayenne pepper, and salt.
8. Simmer uncovered for 12 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. If using fresh bread, let the bread cubes sit at room temperature for at least 12 hours or preheat the oven to 200°F (93°C) and bake the cubes on a cookie sheet for 15 to 20 minutes.
Note: The attribution line has been removed as per the instructions.
